name: Mocha-Raspberry Trifle
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cake into 10-12 slices.
2. Place half of the slices in the trifle bowl.
3. Sprinkle evenly with half of the Kahlua.
4. Top with half of the raspberries.
5. Sprinkle with 1/3 of the dark chocolate.
6. Spread with half of the custard mixture.
7. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
8. Decorate with whipped cream, remaining dark chocolate, and extra raspberries.
9. To make the coffee custard: Whisk egg yolks, cornstarch, and sugar together in a pan until smooth.
10. Heat milk in a separate pan and gradually stir into the egg yolk mixture.
11. Cook, stirring constantly until the mixture boils and thickens.
12. Add combined instant coffee powder, water, and vanilla; cover surface with plastic wrap to prevent skin from forming.
13. Cool to room temperature.
14. Beat whipping cream until soft peaks form and fold into the custard.
